parameters.command: echo "[$(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')] ERROR in workflow: {{ $json.workflow.name }} | Node: {{ $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted }} | Error: {{ $json.execution.error.message }}" >> /opt/bulk-affiliate/logs/errors.log

nodes.name: Log Error to File
nodes.notes: Append error details to persistent log file

parameters.command:
cd /opt/bulk-affiliate && python3 -c "
import smtplib, os
from email.mime.text import MIMEText

smtp_user = os.environ.get('SMTP_USER', '')
smtp_pass = os.environ.get('SMTP_PASS', '')
notify = os.environ.get('NOTIFY_EMAIL', 'skonneh2020@gmail.com')

if not smtp_user or not smtp_pass:
    print('SMTP not configured, skipping email')
    exit(0)

msg = MIMEText('Workflow: {{ $json.workflow.name }}\nNode: {{ $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted }}\nError: {{ $json.execution.error.message }}\n\nCheck /opt/bulk-affiliate/logs/errors.log for details.')
msg['Subject'] = '[ALERT] Bulk Affiliate Pipeline Error'
msg['From'] = smtp_user
msg['To'] = notify

try:
    s = smtplib.SMTP_SSL('smtp.gmail.com', 465)
    s.login(smtp_user, smtp_pass)
    s.sendmail(smtp_user, [notify], msg.as_string())
    s.quit()
    print('Error notification sent')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'Email failed: {e}')
" 2>&1

nodes.name: Send Email Alert
nodes.notes: Send email notification about the pipeline failure. Uses SMTP env vars from .env.cowork
